scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,magenta "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.dev:server: uv run --directory server fastapi dev app/main.py --port 8000
scripts.build:prod: bun run build && rm -rf server/static && cp -r web/dist server/static
scripts.preview: bun run build:prod && bun run start:prod
